link.description: The Firewall Instances Module in Meghraj lets users create and manage virtual firewalls using special Linux or Windows images to protect network traffic in the cloud. It includes easy-to-understand graphs to monitor activity, tools to manage storage (volumes), and alerts to warn about security issues or unusual behavior. This makes it easy to keep your cloud network secure, organized, and running smoothly all from one place in Meghraj. The module also supports snapshots for quick restoration of the Virtual Firewall and offers network management features to connect the Virtual Firewall with associated private networks. Additionally, it provides guidance on reconfiguring the Virtual Firewall and includes basic operations such as restart, force stop, delete, and rename.
